text:
RT @icreatelife: This might be the most personal AI animation I've ever made. 

10 years. New York. Infinite memories. 
Turn your sound on…
Normalize writing kind DMs to people without asking anything in return or any agenda

I asked Claude Opus 4.7 to come up with Analytics page for X app and here's the result. 

Which one do you like more? 
 
Opus 4.7 (left) vs Original (right) https://t.co/xRsse8JuIZ
Got some devastating news 😔 it will mean a lot to me if you share something good that happened to you recently, a sweet photo of a pet or something you made with AI that brings you joy.

RT @doganuraldesign: Just built this in 5 min with Grok 4.3 (beta)

Not bad, huh? https://t.co/tebfZAiLt3
RT @Tesla: Over 5 years, Tesla police vehicles cost 4x less to run vs gas counterparts
RT @tetsuoai: SpaceX completed two Starlink launches about 19 hours apart, pushing the number of Starlink satellites launched in 2026 past…
Damn… Polymarket is gonna be the first 10T company huh?

RT @rryssf_: 🚨🤡 My cofounder Oleksandr Veremeyenko @alex_prompter just hijacked and stole my share of our business @godofprompt 

and even…

Asked Claude Design to make a dating app for X posters.

It eschewed the swipe-based interface, and chose a daily digest with your best matches. 

Some remarkable easter eggs in here, Opus 4.7 is funny!

On another note, I hit rate limits on my Max plan in <30 minutes 😂 https://t.co/pMu7q4pgFT

Amazing idea. It almost happened.

@pmarca @david_perell https://t.co/4PIlmWS91Q

Claude Design 发布了
我们进入了设计的新时代
Figma 看起来如此落伍，没有未来了
Canva 却说他们很开心和 Claude 合作 🤔
https://t.co/1Nsnl89OW2

大模型的本质就是炼化一切数据
一切能产生数据的东西，都在模型的主航道上
区别只是时间，你还有多久会被吃掉

但模型需要触点去接触数据
你其实只有两个选择
要么成为螳螂，要么成为触点

发现身边第二位朋友把自己的一切决策都交给了 Agent
他说他自从开始让他的 Agent 荐股，不到三个月已经获得了 50% 的收益率
这正反馈太强了

资本主义时代，钱是最重要的
后资本主义时代，钱已经不再重要了
钱都不重要了，投资还重要吗？
现在这些一级市场二级市场的东西，都会变得像游戏里的交易所和赌场
这么看 polymarket 很未来

Thank you all so much for such loving and supportive comments. I will respond all and it helps to see such beautiful community around the world. 
One day I will share what is happening to me. But just know that you help me keep going and see how many good people are out there ❤️
